roleCreate.name: Who can create the newspaper
roleCreate.hint: Minimum role required to open the editor.

roleEdit.name: Who can edit the newspaper
roleEdit.hint: Minimum role required to save changes.

rolePublish.name: Who can publish the newspaper
rolePublish.hint: Minimum role required to send the newspaper to chat.

roleView.name: Who can view the newspaper
roleView.hint: Minimum role required to open the viewer.

autoSaveEnabled.name: Auto-save
autoSaveEnabled.hint: Automatically save the current page while editing.

viewer.title: The Newspaper
viewer.journalSaved: Newspaper page saved to your Journal!
viewer.journalRequested: Request sent. The page will appear in your journal.

publish.confirmBody: A message will be sent to all selected recipients. This action cannot be undone.

templates.title: Template Gallery
templates.hint: Choose a template — it will replace all current elements on the page.
templates.warning: Current page elements will be replaced by the template.
